name: Musical Flower Bubble Maker Bubble Toy - Sun Squad™
description:
Discover the joy of play with the musical flower bubble maker from Sun Squad. This delightful bubble toy is crafted with durable material, making it a thoughtful choice for fun. Standing at just over 11 inches tall, it's perfect for little hands to hold and enjoy. Weighing a little over a pound, it's easy to carry around for endless bubble-blowing adventures.

Sun Squad™: Ready for fun.
